# Collection Quality Preview Fixture

This fixture is used for local dashboard preview of collection-quality visibility behavior (warning banner plus month-by-month collection-health calendar).

Design notes:
- Includes two tracked repositories (`demo/alpha`, `demo/beta`).
- Includes retained `collection-status.csv` with healthy, all-zero, skipped, and error days.
- Includes dates in both April and May 2026 so calendar month navigation can be previewed.
- Intended for local `publish` preview, not API collection.
